notes: Reworks Spending Plan spending setup into guided sections for weekly spending, regular bills and planned irregular costs.
Users now work down common real-world costs instead of starting with abstract money-flow/category fields.
Custom spending items now start with the item name and suggest a money-flow destination based on the chosen cost type.
Keeps Assessment, Income, APs and Records structure from the previous release.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.30 Spending Plan guided checklist refinement
release_notes: Reworks Spending Plan spending setup into a guided checklist grouped by real-world costs and money-flow roles, with cleaner custom item entry.
label: v0.6.30 Spending Plan guided checklist refinement
